title: Daily roadmap — Day 1
subtitle: Colombia launch, map anchors, and preterite reporting
objectives: Locate key Colombia regions on the unit map
Use preterite frames to report what you learned or did
Set goals for accurate past-tense communication this unit
canDo: I can name major Colombia regions from the unit map
I can use a simple preterite frame to report past classroom learning

deliverables.title: Launch notes
deliverables.instructionsHtml: Write one preterite sentence about something you learned today and one question you still have.

deliverables.title: Submit in Google Classroom
deliverables.instructionsHtml: Turn in a photo or PDF if your teacher assigned the launch reflection.

warmup.title: Day 1 launch
warmup.description: Review the Colombia launch recap, map anchors, and preterite reporting goals.

grammarReading.title: Travel vocabulary (optional)
grammarReading.description: Preview travel vocabulary in short past-tense contexts before the classroom packet.

steps.prompt: Which form is the yo preterite of ir?
Which sentence reports something that already happened?
Put the words in order: Yesterday I learned.

culture.title: Culture connection
culture.description: Optional: explore the Spanish 2 Colombia vocabulary game suite.
